message:
test(serve): batch 13 — CASS search/preview, bead handlers, daemon control (73.0%→73.7%)

Key per-function improvements:
- handleCASSSearch: 25% → 80% (valid query with full search path)
- handleCASSPreview: 26.9% → 53.8% (valid path, missing path)
- handleListBeads: 55.6% → 74.1% (br installed, filter query params)
- handleBeadsStats/Ready/Blocked/InProgress: 57.1% → 71.4%
- handleBeadsDaemonStatus: 64.3% → 78.6% (error → running:false path)
- handleBeadsDaemonStart/Stop: 60% → 80%
- handleBeadsSync: 63.6% → 81.8%

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
